de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class AbstractSV

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractOperator
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSV
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Named, Operator, ParsableVariable, SchemaVariable, SortedOperator, SVSubstitute, Sorted
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    FormulaSV, ModalOperatorSV, ProgramSV, SkolemTermSV, TermLabelSV, TermSV, UpdateSV, VariableSV

    public abstract class AbstractSV
extends AbstractSortedOperator
implements SchemaVariable
    Abstract base class for schema variables.

      • toString

        protected final String toString(String sortSpec)

      • isStrict

        public final boolean isStrict()
        Specified by:
        isStrict in interface SchemaVariable
        Returns:
        true if the schemavariable has the strict modifier which forces the instantiation to have exactly the same sort as the schemavariable (or if the sv is of generic sort - the instantiation of the generic sort)
